text:
Hunter × Hunter Sōshūhen Treasure (ハンター × ハンター 総集編 トレジャー, lit. HUNTER × HUNTER Omnibus: Treasure) is a series of compilation omnibuses of the Hunter × Hunter manga. Volume 1 was first released in December 2011, with new volumes following sporadically. These compilations are meant to be an affordable option for new readers to catch up with the story without having to purchase the higher-priced single volumes. While printed on low-quality magazine paper, color pages are included, as well as book cover bonuses, advertisements for the 2011 anime, and various explanations of the Hunter × Hunter world.
